svg.text: Goal: show that update4 reduces selected-layer thrash while staying less stale than a fully frozen layer.
Switch rate: lower is less token-level thrash
Higher oracle-match means the carried layer stays fresher.
Cards list exact values for each schedule
update4 cuts switch rate by 80.5% vs update1, keeps oracle-match +0.203 above frozen, and lowers oracle gap by 27.0% vs frozen.
Quality companion: update4 has the strongest mc2 (0.576) while staying tied-best on mc1 (0.400).
